name: Bookmark Home Page
description: A Firefox extension that replaces the home page with a custom page displaying bookmarks.

data_collection.collection: Bookmark URLs and titles from the user's Firefox bookmarks
data_collection.purpose: To display the user's bookmarks on the custom home page
data_collection.retention_period: Data is not stored; only displayed temporarily in the browser
data_collection.disclosure: Data is not shared with third parties
